translations.en: Glory is to my Lord, the Most High. (This is said three times in Arabic.)

items.reference:
Abu Dawud, Ibn Majah, An-Nasa'i, At-Tirmidhi, and Ahmad. See also
Al-Albani, Sahih At-Tirmidhi 1/83.

text.arabic:
سُبْـحانَكَ اللّهُـمَّ رَبَّـنا وَبِحَـمْدِكَ ،
اللّهُـمَّ اغْفِرْ لي
text.transliteration:
Subḥānaka Allāhumma Rabbanā wa biḥamdika
Allāhumma ‘ghfir lī.

translations.en:
Glory is to You, O Allah, our Lord, and praise is Yours.
O Allah, forgive me.

items.reference: Al-Bukhari and Muslim, see invocation no. 34 above.

translations.en: Glory (to You), Most Holy (are You), Lord of the angels and the Spirit.

text.arabic:
اللّهُـمَّ لَكَ سَـجَدْتُ
وَبِـكَ آمَنْـت ،
وَلَكَ أَسْلَـمْت ،
سَجَـدَ وَجْهـي للَّـذي خَلَقَـهُ وَصَـوَّرَهُ
وَشَقَّ سَمْـعَـهُ وَبَصَـرَه ،
تَبـارَكَ اللهُ أَحْسـنُ الخـالِقيـن
text.transliteration:
Allāhumma laka sajadtu
wa bika āmantu,
wa laka aslamtu,
sajada waj’hiya lilladhī khalaqahu, wa ṣawwarahu,
wa shaqqa sam`ahu wa baṣarahu,
tabārakallāhu 'aḥsanul-khāliqīn.

translations.en:
O Allah, to You I prostrate myself and in You I believe.
To You I have submitted.
My face is prostrated to the One Who created it, fashioned it, and gave it hearing and sight.
Blessed is Allah, the Best of creators

text.arabic: سُبْـحانَ ذي الْجَبَـروت، والمَلَكـوت، والكِبْـرِياء، وَالعَظَمَـةِ.

translations.en: Glory is to the master of power, sovereignty, of majesty and greatness.

items.reference:
Abu Dawud 1/230, An-Nasa'i, Ahmad. See also Al-Albani, Sahih Abu Dawud
1/166, see invocation no. 37 above.

text.arabic:
اللّهُـمَّ اغْفِـرْ لي ذَنْـبي كُلَّـه ،
دِقَّـهُ وَجِلَّـه ،
وَأَوَّلَـهُ وَآخِـرَه ،
وَعَلانِيَّتَـهُ وَسِـرَّه
text.transliteration:
Allāhumma’ghfir lī dhanbī kullahu,
diqqahu wa jillahu,
wa awwalahu wa ākhirahu
wa `alāniyyatahu wa sirrahu.

translations.en:
O Allah, forgive me all my sins,
great and small,
the first and the last,
those that are apparent and those that are hidden.

text.arabic:
اللّهُـمَّ إِنِّـي أَعـوذُ بِرِضـاكَ مِنْ سَخَطِـك ، وَبِمعـافاتِـكَ مِنْ عُقوبَـتِك ،
وَأَعـوذُ بِكَ مِنْـك ،
لا أُحْصـي ثَنـاءً عَلَـيْك ،
أَنْـتَ كَمـا أَثْنَـيْتَ عَلـى نَفْسـِك
text.transliteration:
Allāhumma innī a`ūdhu biriḍāka min sakhaṭika,
wa bimu`āfātika min `uqūbatika
wa a`ūdhu bika minka
lā uḥṣī thanā'an `alayka
anta kamā athnayta `alā nafsika.

translations.en:
O Allah, I seek protection in Your pleasure from Your anger,
and I seek protection in Your forgiveness from Your punishment.
I seek protection in You from You.
I cannot count Your praises.
You are as You have praised Yourself.
